title: Visit Marina District: 2026 Marina District, San Francisco Travel Guide | Expedia
content: + Learn more about One Key. Hotels in Marina DistrictFlights to San FranciscoThings to do in San FranciscoCar Rentals in Marina DistrictMarina District Vacations. ## San Francisco. A group of people walking in a courtyard with large stone columns and a small tree. A grand architectural structure with large columns and arches, surrounded by a spacious plaza with people walking and a park in the background. #### Visit the Palace of Fine Arts Theatre and marvel at views of the Golden Gate Bridge at this popular waterfront neighborhood. San Francisco’s Marina District is a stunning neighborhood next to the bay with green spaces, waterfront vistas and chic shops, restaurants and bars. The Palace of Fine Arts Theatre is the only surviving structure from a collection of pieces made for the 1915 expo, a world’s fair designed to celebrate the city’s recovery from the 1906 earthquake and fire. The San Francisco Maritime National Historical Park borders the Marina District to the east.

title: Marina
content: Home to bars, boutiques, and bayside views, the Marina is where San Francisco's young people come to shop, dine, and mingle.

title: Marina guide, moving to San Francisco
content: Incredible neighborhood! Very clean for San Francisco, beautiful homes and apartments, nice blend of young families and singles galore.
